name: Simulated Create – Refund Delay
scenario_description: Noah Patel (Gold) is waiting on a refund for a cancelled booking on ZA303. Tests Booking & Refunds / Medium severity path.
complaint_description: I cancelled a booking on flight ZA303 over three weeks ago and was promised a refund within 7 business days. As of today I have not received the refund and customer service has not responded to my two follow-up emails. The total amount owed is $842.
